response.justification: The candidate is a strong generalist engineer with deep web, Node.js/TypeScript, and DLang experience, but the role's mandatory requirements are not met: professional C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 (far short of 5–10 years, and not clearly Windows-focused), there is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed, and there is no fixed-income or capital-markets domain background beyond brief fintech-adjacent work at RIDE Capital on a Node stack. The mismatch on core skills makes the fit poor despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Broad, long-tenured software engineering career with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (DLang async I/O at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and course creation
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, versus the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain expertise

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and performance-systems background
